ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree program the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_season" TEXT /* Season of enrollment */,
  "full_time_status" INTEGER /* Full-time or part-time status */,
  "enrollment_year" INTEGER /* Year of enrollment */,
  "fruit_preference" TEXT /* Preferred fruit */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "aspiration" TEXT /* Career aspirations or goals of the student */,
  "current_employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the skill */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the skill */,
  "prerequisite_skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite skill, if any */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_skills" (
  "student_skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student skill record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill */,
  "proficiency_level" INTEGER /* Level of proficiency in the skill */,
  "date_acquired" TEXT /* Date when the skill was acquired */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Any certification related to the skill */,
  "confidence_level" INTEGER /* Confidence level in the skill (1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_skills_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_skills_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programming_languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each programming language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the programming language */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the programming language */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the language (1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_programming_languages" (
  "student_language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student programming language record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the programming language */,
  "proficiency_level" INTEGER /* Level of proficiency in the language */,
  "date_started" TEXT /* Date when the student started learning the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_programming_languages_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_programming_languages_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES programming_languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season when the course is offered */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the course is offered */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course is worth */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite course, if any */,
  "max_enrollment" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can enroll in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_courses" (
  "student_course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student course record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received in the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the student in the course (e.g., enrolled, completed, dropped) */,
  "final_project_grade" TEXT /* Grade received for the final project, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_courses_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_courses_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student providing the feedback */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback was given */,
  "professional_experience" INTEGER /* Level of professional experience */,
  "why" TEXT /* Reasons for taking the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the feedback is about */,
  "satisfaction_level" INTEGER /* Satisfaction level with the course (1-10) */,
  "improvement_suggestions" TEXT /* Suggestions for improvement from the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_skills" (
  "course_skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course skill record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill */,
  "importance_level" INTEGER /* Importance level of the skill in the course (1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_skills_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_skills_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the instructor */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date when the instructor was hired */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Instructor's area of specialization */,
  "teaching_experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of teaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructor_courses" (
  "instructor_course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor course record */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the instructor started teaching the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the instructor finished teaching the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructor_courses_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructor_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_feedback" (
  "course_feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course feedback record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback about the course */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student providing the feedback */,
  "satisfaction_level" INTEGER /* Satisfaction level with the course (1-10) */,
  "improvement_suggestions" TEXT /* Suggestions for improvement from the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_feedback_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_feedback_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the resource */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the resource */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the resource */,
  "year_published" INTEGER /* Year the resource was published */,
  "accessibility" TEXT /* Accessibility level of the resource (e.g., free, paid, subscription) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_resources" (
  "course_resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course resource record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "recommended" INTEGER /* Whether the resource is recommended by the instructor */,
  "accessed_by_students" INTEGER /* Number of times the resource has been accessed by students */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_resources_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_resources_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)
